channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep spotlight: St. Francis No. 1 on field and in dugout; Granada treks to North Carolina
item.description: Clayton Valley baseball bounces back from tough season. Two Mt. Diablo basketball players moving on to bigger things. Northgate students chase equestrian, Olympic dreams. South Bay All-Star basketball game raises money to fight cancer.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Final AP mock NFL draft: Ward, Hunter, Carter go 1-2-3 and Saints trade up for Sanders
item.description: The Tennessee Titans explored all their options with the No. 1 pick in the NFL draft. They can’t pass up a shot at a potential franchise quarterback. If the Titans were going to trade the pick for more draft assets, a deal would’ve happened already.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. violates MLB social media policy in post ripping umpire after ejection
item.description: New York Yankees infielder Jazz Chisholm Jr. was ejected from Thursday night's game and may have violated MLB policy with his public criticism on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Five stats and milestones that explain Steph Curry’s incredible season for Warriors
item.description: Steph Curry's longevity and scoring prowess were key factors in his work rewriting the NBA's history books this regular season.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Kawhi Leonard is fresh in mind and body as the streaking Los Angeles Clippers open the playoffs
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Kawhi Leonard is fresh in mind and body this year, no longer relegated to watching from the sideline when the Los Angeles Clippers begin the postseason.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dozens of 5th graders to complete 260-mile bike trek across California
item.description: Fifty-seven fifth graders rode their bikes across the state of California over seven days, testing their mental and physical strength and boosting their confidence and self-esteem.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Chisholm ejected for arguing called 3rd strike during Yankees' 6-3 win over Rays
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jazz Chisholm Jr. was ejected from the New York Yankees' 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Thursday night, then appeared to violate Major League Baseball's social media policy when he posted in-game criticism online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NFL Draft is one week away; 49ers, Raiders eye top-valued picks
item.description: The 2025 NFL Draft begins on April 24 and the San Francisco 49ers and the Las Vegas Raiders both have a good shot at snagging top-10 valued talent.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, KRON4

item.title: Karnišovas' vague end-of-year presser focuses on free agency, draft, and youth development
item.description: Artūras Karnišovas discussed the Chicago Bulls' end-of-year press conference, highlighting their goals of defining their style of play, retaining their 2025 first-round pick, targeting young players, and focusing on internal development, while also announcing their intention to pursue a premier free
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bill Belichick nabs 4-star receiver for UNC who was going to play for Deion Sanders at Colorado
item.description: Bill Belichick and UNC have brought in four-star receiver Adrian Wilson, who entered the transfer portal Wednesday after previously committing to Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred meets with President Donald Trump at White House
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred met this week at the White House with President Donald Trump. “President Trump is a longtime fan of baseball," MLB said in a statement Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says he's not holding teams hostage as he ponders his future in the NFL
item.description: Aaron Rodgers is in no rush to make a decision about his future. The free-agent quarterback said during an appearance on “The Pat McAfee Show” on Thursday that he is “not holding anybody hostage" as he weighs whether to return for a 21st season. Rodgers was released by the New York Jets in March.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man United seals spectacular comeback to beat Lyon 5-4 and advance to Europa League semifinals
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United’s season isn’t done yet. On a night of high drama at Old Trafford, the troubled Premier League club put its domestic problems to one side by sealing a spectacular comeback to beat Lyon 5-4 and advance to the semifinals of the Europa League.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PGA star signs woman's leg after hitting it with errant tee shot
item.description: Billy Horschel found himself in an awkward moment Thursday at the RBC Heritage. He signed a woman's leg after he hit it with a tee shot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Thomas makes 11 birdies for a 61 to take the lead at Harbour Town
item.description: HILTON HEAD ISLAND, S.C. (AP) — Justin Thomas had a round to match the immaculate weather Thursday at Harbour Town with 11 birdies that allowed him to tie the course record with a 10-under 61 to lead the RBC Heritage.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cal losing Bay Area football products Jaivian Thomas, Jack Endries to transfer portal
item.description: Former McClymonds High star Jaivian Thomas led Cal in rushing last season. Jack Endries, a former Monte Vista standout, caught 56 passes for the Bears in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Luka Doncic eager to start playing big games for Lakers, starting in playoff date with Timberwolves
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Luka Doncic has been with the Los Angeles Lakers for 2 1/2 months now, and he's feeling fairly comfortable in his new home. He is building chemistry with his new teammates, who are getting used to his brilliant passes, prolific scoring outbursts and fiery competitiveness.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida State cancels all on-campus sports events through the weekend after on-campus shooting
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida State has canceled all home athletic events, including its final spring football practices and a baseball series against Virginia, through the weekend after an on-campus shooting Thursday left two dead and at least six others injured.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears announce plans for Chicago NFL draft party at Soldier Field
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced their lineup of activities and entertainment for their NFL draft party on April 24, 2025, at Soldier Field, featuring exclusive on-field access, behind-the-scenes moments, and interactive activities, as well as appearances by current and former Bears players.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aaron Rodgers addresses ‘bulls---' offseason rumors, reveals major factor in decision to play in 2025
item.description: Four-time league MVP Aaron Rodgers set the record straight on Thursday about the rumors surrounding his offseason moves.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College football players chasing dollars with portal open and House settlement approval delayed
item.description: The opening of the college football transfer portal has created a dash for cash. The delay in approving the House vs.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NY Rangers' Panarin, MSG made settlement payments after employee sexual assault allegations: report
item.description: The NHL says the New York Rangers kept it apprised of an independent investigation into sexual assault allegations by a team employee against player Artemi Panarin and considers the matter closed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Off-road racer becoming one of most dominant drivers in desert
item.description: The Imperial Valley spans an area of roughly 4,400 square miles, and Brock Heger knows almost every inch of it.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Report: TJ Edwards signs extension with the Bears
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed linebacker TJ Edwards to a two-year, $20 million extension, with $16.6 million in guaranteed money, following the extension of defensive back Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox DFA Mike Clevinger, call-up Steven Wilson from AAA
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have designated Mike Clevinger for assignment and called up reliever Steven Wilson from Triple-A, while Wilson remains on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks prospect Ryan Greene makes his NHL debut at Montreal
item.description: Ryan Greene made his NHL debut with the Chicago Blackhawks on Monday night, playing 13 minutes in a 4-3 shootout win at Montreal, and is expected to play in their final game of the season at Ottawa on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs can't hold lead, MLB-best Padres surge late to win opening game of 3-game series in San Diego
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The Cubs' West Coast gauntlet against two of the best teams in baseball rolls on this week, with two games left.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Nazar scores in shootout to give Blackhawks 4-3 win over Canadiens
item.description: Frank Nazar scored the only goal of the shootout, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat Montreal 4-3 on Monday night, spoiling Canadiens rookie Ivan Demidov's NHL debut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears sign Kyler Gordon to record extension, make him highest-paid slot corner in NFL
item.description: The Chicago Bears have agreed to a three-year, $40 million contract extension with corner Kyler Gordon, making him one of the highest-paid corners in the NFL and keeping him in Chicago for at least the next four seasons.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA's West spots set, with the Nuggets, Clippers and Timberwolves in and the Warriors play-in bound
item.description: The Los Angeles Clippers worked overtime to clinch a playoff spot — and send the Golden State Warriors to the NBA's play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
